title: After Zohran Mamdani's election, New York's Muslim spirit shines bright
subhead: The election of the young Democrat, a Shia of Indian descent, has highlighted the vitality of the Muslim community in the nation's largest city. This new generation of believers, shaped by 9/11 and champions of a progressive Islam, is part of a cultural and intellectual ferment reminiscent of the emergence of New York's Jewish identity more than half a century ago.

Paris mayoral frontrunner Grégoire faces fierce attacks from rivals in debate
subhead: Emmanuel Grégoire, the Socialist who led in the first round, struggled to present his proposals during the debate as Sophia Chikirou and Rachida Dati took aim at him from his left and right.

title: Macron announces mediation to salvage European fighter jet project
subhead: The FCAS program, a flagship joint effort to build a next-generation combat aircraft between France, Germany and Spain, has faltered as disagreements persist between France's Dassault Aviation and Airbus.

title: Senegal to appeal CAF Africa Cup of Nations decision
subhead: The Confederation of African Football reversed Senegal's Africa Cup of Nations win on Tuesday, awarding the title to Morocco two months after the final. The final in Rabat on January 18 descended into chaos when several Senegalese players walked off the pitch in protest after the hosts were awarded a penalty late in second-half stoppage time.

title: War in Iran: 'Europe said no to the US. This is new, and it is a major development'
subhead: The Europeans' refusal to join Washington in the current Middle East war shows that the transatlantic rift is deeper than the one seen during the 2003 Iraq crisis, observes Le Monde columnist Sylvie Kauffmann.

title: Five takeaways from the first round of French local elections
subhead: The 2026 municipal elections have already concluded in the vast majority of French towns, with a mayor being directly elected in the first round. In larger cities, however, the right and the Socialists are in the lead for the second round.
